title: 7 Oversold Stocks Begging for a Spot in Your Portfolio

title: 3 Dividend Stocks That Should Pay You the Rest of Your Life

title: RTX's Unit Secures Contract for Satellite Communications Pod
text: RTX Corporation's (RTX) unit Collins Aerospace will provide a secure and reliable wireless data network to warfighters through its Beyond-Line-Of-Sight satellite communications pod.

title: The 3 Best Space Stocks to Buy in August
text: The aerospace industry plays a pivotal role in shaping modern transportation, defense systems and scientific exploration. Driven by a demand for innovation, engineers are more inclined than ever to explore beyond Earth.

title: Sell Alert: 3 Aerospace and Defense Stocks to Dump ASAP
text: The aerospace and defense industry is one investors should pay attention to and possibly invest in to diversify their portfolios. Defense companies tend not to follow market volatility as much as other industries.
